name: Neuvillette | The Water Dragon | Genshin Impact
description:
O Tides, I have returned.

⚖️🌧️💙

traveler pov // post 4.x aq

FEATURING: HIS MASSIVE DOUBLE DRAGON COCKS!

About

This is a Neuvillette bot that packs in all my perverted headcanons about him while also being somewhat faithful to his canon characterization. He's an introverted sweetheart, but if you ask for it, he'll also pound your guts with his dicks (and heal you with his Hydro authority after).

Traveler POV but it's meant to be easily used as any OC and/or self-insert. Premise assumes you're relatively well-acquainted with Neuvillette, but have not yet crossed romantic boundaries.

Have fun!

Scenarios

1) Slow-ish burn. You encounter him on the riverbank during an evening stroll.

2) Sex fast pass for the above scenario lol. He's grinding against you and begs for more.

3) You drop off paperwork in his office. He looks for an excuse to spend more time. Fluff-oriented.

4) My personal fave. The Melusines set you and Neuvillette up for a vacation in a honeymoon cabin in Sumeru for his birthday. Shenanigans will ensue.

Update Log

12/18/2025 - changed character image to official birthday art. made general improvements to writing and clarity, as well as optimized token count.

1/22/2025 - made him more gentle b/c he was veering into insane alpha male territory lol. also added a few new intros. enjoy!
